pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh where the integration manual is generated.
Found in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh where the path is strictly evaluated.

Checked ArduPilot unit conversions against constraints strictly defined in the setup_task.sh manual (e.g. 15 degrees * 100 = 1500 centidegrees, 3.0 m/s * 100 = 300 cm/s, etc.).

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the required file paths (manual_path, signoff_path, result_file) explicitly match those defined across task scripts. Confirmed the expected drone parameters (ANGLE_MAX 1500, WPNAV_SPEED 300, WPNAV_ACCEL 100, WPNAV_ACCEL_Z 50, WPNAV_SPEED_UP 150, WPNAV_SPEED_DN 100) are mathematically correct unit conversions (e.g. degrees to centidegrees, m/s to cm/s) explicitly derived from the physical constraints outlined in the synthetically generated integration manual.
